full_text:
Jia Kui (Liangdao) 賈逵 (梁道)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jia Kui (賈逵), styledLiangdao (梁道), was born in Xiang Ling County, He Dong Prefecture (Presently Li Fen, Shan Xi Province). Served as strategist to Cao Xiu, seeing through Zhou Fang’s plot. Jia Kui was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Jia Kui lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
